ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "terminal_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the terminal */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the terminal is located */,
  "municipal" TEXT /* Municipal area where the terminal is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the terminal's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the terminal's location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the terminal (e.g., Existing, Planned) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the terminal (number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the terminal was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the station */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the bike */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terminal where the bike is currently located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Use, Maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the bike (if electric) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike (latitude and longitude) */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., Road, Mountain, Electric) */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Member, Admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., Monthly, Annual) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the ride */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the ride */,
  "start_terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal where the ride started */,
  "end_terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal where the ride ended */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ride */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ride */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride in kilometers */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the ride (1-5) */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken during the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_start_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_end_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item (bike or terminal) being maintained */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Bike, Terminal) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., Routine, Repair) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was scheduled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the person who completed the maintenance */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was completed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item (station or bike) being rated */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Station, Bike) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., System Update, Payment Due) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
